Allows managing all your autocrafters from a single interface.
items.item.refinedstorage.autocrafting_monitor: Displays the status of autocrafting tasks and allows you to cancel autocrafting tasks in your storage network.
items.item.refinedstorage.autocrafting_upgrade: Will start an autocrafting task for missing resources.
items.item.refinedstorage.cable.help: Connects storage network devices with each other. For full blocks, will connect to any color. For cable blocks, will only connect to the same color or to the default color (gray).
items.item.refinedstorage.configuration_card.c: Cannot apply configuration card to different type of device. It is configured for %s.
Use on the destination storage network device while crouching to transfer the configuration and upgrades. Use while crouching to clear.
items.item.refinedstorage.configuration_card.e: Use on a storage network device while crouching to copy its configuration and upgrades to the card.
items.item.refinedstorage.constructor.help: Places blocks from the storage network in the world.
items.item.refinedstorage.controller.help: Provides the storage network with energy. Multiple are allowed in a single storage network.
items.item.refinedstorage.crafting_grid.help: Allows for interacting with the storage network, with crafting abilities.
Provides the storage network with an infinite source of energy.
items.item.refinedstorage.creative_fluid_stora: Stores an infinite amount of buckets.
Stores an infinite amount of buckets.
items.item.refinedstorage.creative_range_upgra: Provides infinite range for the Wireless Transmitter. Does not work cross-dimensionally.
items.item.refinedstorage.creative_storage_blo: Stores an infinite amount of items.
items.item.refinedstorage.creative_storage_dis: Stores an infinite amount of items.
items.item.refinedstorage.destructor.help: Destroys blocks from the world and puts them in the storage network.
items.item.refinedstorage.detector.help: Emits a redstone signal if the storage network contains a resource equal, above or under a given amount.
items.item.refinedstorage.disk_drive.help: Accepts storage disks to provide the storage network with storage space.
items.item.refinedstorage.disk_interface.help: Transfers resources between the storage network and provided storage disks.
items.item.refinedstorage.exporter.help: Exports resources from the storage network to an external destination.
items.item.refinedstorage.external_storage.hel: Provides the storage network with storage from an external source.
items.item.refinedstorage.fallback_security_ca: Acts as a fallback if no matching Security Card for a player is found. Right click to configure. Use while crouching to clear configuration.
Stores %s buckets. When empty, use while holding to return the Fluid Storage Part and Machine Casing. Upgradeable to a higher tier by combining with a Fluid Storage Part.
items.item.refinedstorage.fluid_storage_disk.h: Stores %s buckets. When empty, use while holding to return the Fluid Storage Part. Upgradeable to a higher tier by combining with a Fluid Storage Part.
items.item.refinedstorage.fortune_upgrade.help: Yields more resources when breaking a block. Acts like the Fortune enchantment on a pickaxe.
items.item.refinedstorage.grid.help: Allows for interacting with the storage network.
items.item.refinedstorage.importer.help: Imports resources from an external source to the storage network.
items.item.refinedstorage.interface.help: Combines importing and exporting via intermediate slots; external inventories must insert and extract manually.
items.item.refinedstorage.network_card.bound_h: Insert into a Network Transmitter. Use while crouching to clear binding.
items.item.refinedstorage.network_card.unbound: Use while crouching on a Network Receiver.
items.item.refinedstorage.network_item.cannot_: There isn't any %s in your inventory.
There is more than one %s in your inventory.
items.item.refinedstorage.network_item.unbound: Use on any storage network device to bind.
items.item.refinedstorage.network_receiver.hel: Receives a network signal wirelessly. Bind a Network Card to this block.
Transmits a network signal wirelessly. Needs a Network Card that is paired with a Network Receiver.
items.item.refinedstorage.pattern.help: Used in autocrafting to store the recipe to be crafted. Use while crouching to clear.
items.item.refinedstorage.pattern_grid.help: Allows for the creation of Patterns for use in autocrafting.
items.item.refinedstorage.portable_grid.help: Allows to interact with a storage disk while not being connected to a storage network. Can be used from your inventory, or placed in the world when crouching.
items.item.refinedstorage.range_upgrade.help: Increases the range of the Wireless Transmitter.
items.item.refinedstorage.regulator_upgrade.he: In an Exporter, will only export if the amount in the target is less than configured in the upgrade. In an Importer, will only import if the amount in the target is more than configured in the upgrade. Use item to configure.
items.item.refinedstorage.relay.help: Turn entire sections of a storage network on or off and create new branches of your network.
Right click to configure. Use while crouching to clear configuration and binding.
items.item.refinedstorage.security_card.unboun: Right click to configure and bind to the current player.
items.item.refinedstorage.silk_touch_upgrade.h: Acts like the Silk Touch enchantment on a pickaxe.
items.item.refinedstorage.speed_upgrade.help: Increases the operation speed of a storage network device.
items.item.refinedstorage.stack_upgrade.help: Increases the amount of resources that the storage network device handles per operation.
items.item.refinedstorage.storage_block.help: Stores %s items. When empty, use while holding to return the Storage Part and Machine Casing. Upgradeable to a higher tier by combining with a Storage Part.
items.item.refinedstorage.storage_disk.help: Stores %s items. When empty, use while holding to return the Storage Part. Upgradeable to a higher tier by combining with a Storage Part.
items.item.refinedstorage.storage_monitor.help: A block that displays the current amount of a certain resource in your storage network. SHIFT + right click to configure. Left click to extract a stack, SHIFT + left click to extract a single resource, right click to insert a resource, right click multiple times to insert resources in bulk.
items.item.refinedstorage.wireless_transmitter: Provides wireless network access for items like the Wireless Grid. Multiple are allowed in an area for wider coverage.
items.item.refinedstorage.wrench.help: Use to rotate blocks or press SHIFT and use to dismantle Refined Storage blocks.

blocks.block.refinedstorage.security_manager.he: When this device is active, will protect the network by default and block all operations. Start adding Security Cards to permit or deny specific operations for a player.
